ham.subject: Your Order #1234567890 has been confirmed – Amazon.in
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.in. We are pleased to confirm that your order (Order ID: 1234567890) has been successfully placed and is now being processed.

Order Details:
• Item: Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra – 128GB (Black)
• Quantity: 1
• Total Paid: ₹ 99,990 (incl. shipping & taxes)

Estimated Delivery: 3-5 working days

If you have any questions or need to update your shipping address, please visit your account on Amazon.in.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best Regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet (Wallet ID: 0xA1B2C3D4E5F6). As a security measure, the wallet has been temporarily suspended to protect your assets.

To restore full access, please verify your identity by completing the following steps:
1. Log in to the official wallet portal.
2. Click the “Verify Account” button.
3. Submit a clear copy of your government ID and a recent selfie.
4. Follow the on-screen instructions to confirm your ownership.

Please complete the verification within 24 hours to avoid permanent suspension. Failure to do so may result in loss of access to your funds.

Click the secure link below to start the verification process:
<URL>

If you did not initiate this request, please ignore this email and contact our support immediately.

Regards,
CryptoSafe Security Team
